# Feature Gap Priorities

## P0

- Fix delivery API compilation and service contract mismatches
- Confirm all core frontend pages boot without runtime failures

## P1

- Delivery staff dashboard and assignment handling UI
- Real-time order tracking for customer and admin
- Support ticket backend and frontend

## P2

- Return/refund pipeline with transaction-safe updates
- Inventory monitoring and low-stock actions
- Admin analytics and business reporting

## P3

- Advanced notifications and growth features
- Additional optimization and automation

## Working Rule

Pick one feature at a time and deliver full vertical slice:

- schema (if needed)
- validation
- backend route/controller/service
- frontend api/hook/page
- translation keys
- test coverage for critical path
